ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel package */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city included in the package */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the package */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the package */,
  "days" TEXT /* Duration of stay in days */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package details */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel package */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the package (e.g., honeymoon, romantic getaway) */,
  "inclusions" TEXT /* Details of what is included in the package */,
  "exclusions" TEXT /* Details of what is not included in the package */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Information about the cancellation policy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel agent who created the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_packages_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_packages_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the city */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the city */,
  "tourist_attractions" TEXT /* List of major tourist attractions */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* Information about available transportation options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each itinerary entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated travel package */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* Day number of the itinerary */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Activities planned for the day */,
  "hotel" TEXT /* Hotel where guests will stay */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activities for the day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activities for the day */,
  "meal_inclusions" TEXT /* Details of meals included for the day */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* Details of transportation for the day */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the guide for the day */,
  "hotel_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the hotel (e.g., 3-star, 5-star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, agent, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the booking */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel package booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "reservation_number" TEXT /* Unique reservation number for the booking */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the travel agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the agent account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the agent account was last updated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent based on user reviews */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, itinerary change) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel package being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user regarding the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been approved for public display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents_packages" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel agent managing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel package managed by the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the agent was assigned to the package */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities_packages" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the package is offered */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel package associated with the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was associated with the city */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "package_id")
)
